headline: Samsung market cap crosses $1 trillion amid memory chip rally
summary: Samsung Electronics (005930.KS, SMSN.IL) reached a $1 trillion market cap on Wednesday as the memory chip shortage drives the hardware manufacturer — and other memory chip developers — even higher. Market Domination Host Josh Lipton and Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley sit down to discuss the rally occurring in the memory chip landscape.

headline: Ahold Delhaize & Uber Eats Expand Partnership: Upside Ahead?
summary: UBER expands Uber Eats grocery delivery with Ahold Delhaize USA, adding nearly 2,000 Northeast/Mid-Atlantic stores, promos, Uber One perks and SNAP/EBT.

raw.headline: Ahold Delhaize & Uber Eats Expand Partnership: Upside Ahead?

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Best Buy (BBY) Tweaking Membership Fees And Rewards To Boost Loyalty
summary: In early May 2026, Best Buy announced that from June 4 it will add a 1% rewards points system for its paid My Best Buy Plus and Total memberships, increase rewards to 6% for purchases made with its co-branded credit card, and raise the annual fee for My Best Buy Total. This shift signals Best Buy’s attempt to deepen customer loyalty and enhance recurring membership economics at a time when competition in electronics retail and consumer spending pressures remain intense. We’ll now examine how...
